final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between AI concepts, hand-drawn illustration style, visually rich with icons and annotations, clear and approachable for general audiences.

Style/medium: hand-drawn sketch infographic, pen-and-ink with light watercolor fills, whiteboard explainer aesthetic, reminiscent of RSA Animate visual notes
Composition: multi-panel layout with concept nodes connected by annotated arrows, central hub-and-spoke or flowchart arrangement, balanced use of white space
Subject: seven interconnected concepts — AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — each with a short definition label and a small illustrative icon; relationship lines labeled with how concepts connect or depend on each other
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white paper texture background, no photographic environment
Lighting/mood: flat even lighting, friendly and educational tone
Color palette: warm off-white base, ink-black line art as anchor, soft accent colors (sky blue, mint green, warm yellow) used sparingly to differentiate concept clusters
Materials/textures: visible pencil sketch under-lines, slight paper grain, hand-lettered annotation style
Text (verbatim): "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: all seven concept labels must appear legibly; relationship arrows must be labeled; layout must remain readable at A4 print size
Avoid: corporate slide deck aesthetic, 3D chrome effects, photorealistic rendering, clipart stock icons, gradient backgrounds
